title: Early years SENCO training programme: evaluation
body: "This report outlines the findings from the evaluation of the early years special educational needs coordinator (SENCO) training programme.  The programme was a 4-month online course, available from August 2022 to August 2024.  The research included:   a survey of trainees interviews diary studies secondary data analysis regional case studies   It involved:   trainees early years practitioners who did not take part in the programme, for comparison early years setting managers parents local authority representatives strategic stakeholders, such as training providers   "

taxons.title: Support for special educational needs and disability (SEND)
